table_description: Stores each client’s or customer's details and risk profile i.e its tolerance for market volatility (conservative, balanced, aggressive). PK: customer_id. Referenced by Portfolio, InvestmentGoal, Proposal.
create_statement: CREATE TABLE Customer (customer_id STRING NOT NULL, name STRING, email STRING, phone STRING, risk_profile STRING);

table_description: Snapshot of a customer’s or client's investment portfolio where . PK: portfolio_id. FK: customer_id → Customer. Contains market value and gain/loss and year-to-date and return percentages.
create_statement: CREATE TABLE Portfolio (portfolio_id STRING NOT NULL,customer_id STRING,current_value FLOAT64,valuation_date DATE,total_return_pct FLOAT64,ytd_return_pct FLOAT64);

table_description: Defines customer's financial or investment objectives. PK: goal_id. FK: customer_id → Customer. Includes goal type(eg. education, retirement) , target amount (monetary objective), and time horizon ( i.e years to goal).
create_statement: CREATE TABLE InvestmentGoal (goal_id STRING NOT NULL,customer_id STRING,goal_type STRING,target_amount FLOAT64,years_to_goal INT64);

table_description: Catalog of speacialized advisors available. PK: advisor_id. Lists contact info and area of expertise.
create_statement: CREATE TABLE FinancialAdvisor (advisor_id STRING NOT NULL,name STRING,email STRING,phone STRING,specialization STRING);

table_description: Investment proposals generated by advisor for clients/customer. PK: proposal_id. FK: customer_id → Customer, advisor_id → FinancialAdvisor. Tracks status, date, and summary.
create_statement: CREATE TABLE Proposal (proposal_id STRING NOT NULL,customer_id STRING,advisor_id STRING,status STRING,proposed_on DATE,proposal_summary STRING);

table_description: Notes from client‑advisor meetings tied to a proposal. PK: meeting_id. FK: proposal_id → Proposal. Records date and minutes text.
create_statement: CREATE TABLE MeetingMinutes (meeting_id STRING NOT NULL,proposal_id STRING,meeting_date DATE,minutes STRING);

table_description: Line items in proposals. PK: order_id. FK: proposal_id → Proposal. Lists product types, names, amounts, and units.
create_statement: CREATE TABLE ProposalOrder (order_id STRING NOT NULL,proposal_id STRING,product_type STRING,product_name STRING,amount FLOAT64,units FLOAT64);
